$description: Dark-theme overrides — ONLY the semantic color layer is repointed at different primitives; primitives, radius, typography and motion are NOT duplicated. Emitted into the `.dark` block of tokens.css. DARK IS DEFERRED (brand → token map §1.3): the brand is light-first and a brand dark surface is future work. This keeps the #233 neutral dark functional (no regression) with the brand primary blue/red/status threaded through so a dark surface does not fall back to gray. Roles not listed here (primary-hover/pressed, success/warning) inherit their light brand values — acceptable for a deferred dark.
